# Open Questions

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/distributionhostdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Store Channel Policy](../store-channel-policy.md)

Open questions are delegated to [`../../../50-roadmap/open-questions.md`](../../../50-roadmap/open-questions.md). Resolved implementation decisions should move into generated C11 domain docs instead of staying here.

| ID | Status | Handling |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Q-DIST-001` | resolved | `mac-app-store` external provider CLI execution requires user-selected or sandbox/security-scoped OS grant plus Store review approval; otherwise the provider is store-blocked or demo-only. |
| `Q-DIST-002` | resolved | `msix-store` uses a packaged full-trust helper/tray process as the local runtime broker; Windows service default install is forbidden. |
| `Q-DIST-003` | open | ConsentLedger durable storage substrate remains a roadmap question: local JSON append log only, OS secure storage, or a hybrid. |
| `Q-DIST-004` | resolved elsewhere | Private-source Store App repository ownership is tracked as `Q-CTX-005`; this public daemon doc should not fork that ownership question. |
